title: CreativeCraft
description: Ever wanted a modpack that has basically everything to create AND works with almost everything, well now you got it!
body:
# Important Notice

**🚨 WARNING: DO NOT USE OPTIFINE WITH THIS MODPACK! 🚨**

If you use OptiFine with this pack, it will not launch properly. Please remove OptiFine to ensure the modpack functions correctly. This pack has Rubidium & Oculus installed already, just pop a shader into the shader packs folder!

#
Creative craft explore endless exploring with improved structures and tinkering with Create!

This pack took a lot of tinkering to get to function properly, let me tell you what you have in store! You have Touch as Nails, so keep an eye on your water meter! 
<details>
<summary>Hint for water meter</summary>

You need to craft water bottles to refill it as far as I know, lol also you will not regenerate health if it's low.

</details>

You also have many different animals, such as snakes! There are also better default structures! Check out the Gallery tab so you can take a look at them!

# Additional information
I would recommend using Complementary Reimagined with this pack.
This pack does not come with additional shader packs or texture packs.
